primary.title: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
primary.summary: Anthropic is making it easier to switch to its Claude AI from other chatbots with an update that brings Claude's memory feature to users on the free plan, along with a new prompt and dedicated tool fo
primary.rankReason: Anthropic 将 Claude 记忆功能扩展至免费用户并推出竞品导入工具，配合 ChatGPT 卸载潮形成完整的用户争夺战略，对产品设计者有直接参考价值

alternates.title: OpenAI 签约美国国防部引发 Cancel ChatGPT 运动，卸载量飙升 295%，Claude 下载量大涨
alternates.summary: Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.
alternates.rankReason: OpenAI 国防部交易引发用户大规模抛弃，Anthropic 被美国政府封禁——这是 AI 行业商业格局与伦理边界的标志性事件，直接影响开发者和企业的平台选择策略

alternates.title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
alternates.summary: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents,
alternates.rankReason: 阿里巴巴开源的 AI Agent 通用沙盒平台，支持多语言 SDK 和 K8s 运行时，直接解决 Coding Agent 和 GUI Agent 的安全执行问题，开发者可立即使用
